name: BMI Calculator for Teens
description: Estimate BMI for teens and get a general idea of healthy ranges.
formulaDescription: BMI gives a quick estimate for teens, but use growth charts for clinical interpretation.

outputs.category: Use age/gender growth charts for interpretation

example.explanation: A BMI of 20.2 is a general estimate; growth charts provide more precise guidance for teens.

faqs.question: Should teens use adult BMI categories?
faqs.answer: No, teen BMI is best interpreted using age and gender percentiles.
